zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby於1165年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby25歲，母親Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby22歲。他於大約1189年與Hawise Multon在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1237年在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby于1165年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，他的父亲Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby25岁，母亲Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby22岁。他于大约1189年与Hawise Multon在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1237年在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby was born in 1165, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, was 25 and his mother, Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby, was 22. He married Hawise Multon about 1189, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1237, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby est né en 1165, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Multon environ 1189, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1237, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

Er hat um 1189 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Hawise Multon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1237 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby è nato il nel 1165 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Multon circa 1189, nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1237, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Beke Lord of Eresbyが1165年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Walter de Beke Lord of Eresbyは25歳，母Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresbyは22歳であった。約1189年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーでHawise Multonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1237年に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby(이)가 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 Hawise Multon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1237년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby nasceu em 1165, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Multon aproximadamente 1189, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1237, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby родился в 1165 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Multon около 1189 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1237 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby nació en 1165, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hawise Multon aproximadamente 1189, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1237, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
